title: asta schaffneri
intro: Asta schaffneri, also known as Schaffner's milk vetch or Astragalus schaffneri, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of asta schaffneri include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions such as asthma and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of asta schaffneri can be made into teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
intro_study: According to "Molecular biology reports", asta schaffneri benefits include a potential reduction in inflammation and oxidative stress due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities.
